news.title: Oil prices jump and Asian shares slip as US and Iran carry out airstrikes
news.summary: Oil prices jumped and Asian shares were mostly lower Monday after the U.S. carried out airstrikes and Iran retaliated.  The price of Brent crude, the international standard, gained 3.9% to $78.96 per barrel, while U.S. benchmark crude oil added 4% to $74.26 per barrel.  Prices for both types of crude oil recently had slipped back to the levels they were at before the war with Iran began, after the two sides set an interim agreement on ending the conflict and ships resumed transporting oil through the Strait of Hormuz.

news.title: Apple (AAPL) Sues OpenAI Over AI Hardware Trade Secrets
news.summary: Apple (NasdaqGS:AAPL) has filed a federal lawsuit against OpenAI alleging theft of trade secrets tied to its AI hardware work. The complaint centers on claims that former Apple employees took confidential materials and shared them with OpenAI. The filing escalates a public feud involving senior tech leaders and highlights rising rivalry across AI hardware and software. Apple enters this legal fight while its stock trades at $315.32, with the company up 16.4% year to date and 49.9% over the...
